id.description: Plugin-local panel id; must match the module's exported RendererPanel.id.
id.title: maxLength(64)

module.description: Relative module path under the plugin package root exporting a RendererPanel default.

slot.description: Target default-renderer slot (status-bar, task-tree:footer, or doctor:summary).

watch.description: an array of at most 32 item(s)
watch.title: maxItems(32)
